parents.subject: LU-18222 quota: add LQA directory-based record management

commit.subject: LU-18222 nodemap: add lqa_quota_ops rbac role
commit.message:
LU-18222 nodemap: add lqa_quota_ops rbac role

The purpose of the new lqa_quota_ops rbac role is to handle
lqa-related quota commands. When not set, clients cannot set lqa
specific quotas.

sanity-sec test_64c is updated to exercise the new lqa_quota_ops rbac
role.

Update lctl-nodemap-modify man page to mention new lqa_quota_ops
rbac role.

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I02fad1467c3ccf06918b821aa594401896500c1e
